changelog: **ESLint `max-lines-per-function` violations** — silenced two unavoidable `describe()` block warnings in standalone-scripts E2E tests (`run-credit-sort-e2e.test.ts`, `run-free-plan-expiry-e2e.test.ts`) with targeted `// eslint-disable-next-line` directives. Unblocks the standalone-lint CI job (was failing with `--max-warnings=0`).
Version bump: 3.30.1 → 3.31.0 (all version files + README pin synced).
